chronex_appointments.name: Kabir Sharma
chronex_appointments.notes: Interested in trying out the Rolex Submariner Date.

chronex_appointments.name: Ananya Iyer
chronex_appointments.notes: Would like to view the Cartier Santos and Jaeger-LeCoultre Reverso.

chronex_appointments.name: Vikram Malhotra
chronex_appointments.notes: Looking for a luxury sports chronograph. Please keep options ready.

chronex_appointments.name: Meera Reddy
chronex_appointments.notes: Gift shopping for husband. Omega or Tudor preferred.

chronex_appointments.name: Aditya Sen
chronex_appointments.notes: First high-end watch purchase. Needs custom consulting.

chronex_appointments.name: Nisha Patel
chronex_appointments.notes: Wants to view ladies Diamond collection.

chronex_services.name: Kabir Sharma
chronex_services.issueDescription: Gaining 15 seconds per day, needs regulation and movement lubrication.

chronex_services.name: Ananya Iyer
chronex_services.issueDescription: Condensation inside glass after swimming. Gaskets probably worn out.

chronex_services.name: Vikram Malhotra
chronex_services.issueDescription: Deep desk-diving scratches on the bracelet and case side.

chronex_services.name: Meera Reddy
chronex_services.issueDescription: Sapphire glass has a minor chip near the 2 o'clock position.

chronex_services.name: Aditya Sen
chronex_services.issueDescription: Bezel alignment is slightly off center. Movement runs fine.

chronex_services.name: Nisha Patel
chronex_services.issueDescription: Change steel bracelet to premium brown alligator leather strap.

chronex_services.name: Rajesh Gupta
chronex_services.issueDescription: Quartz movement stopped running last week. Needs new battery.

chronex_services.name: Shreya Joshi
chronex_services.issueDescription: Replace battery and pressure test for water resistance.

chronex_services.name: Karan Verma
chronex_services.issueDescription: Vintage piece inherited, hasn't run in 10 years. Needs full service.

chronex_services.name: Diya Kapoor
chronex_services.issueDescription: Top pusher is sticky and chronograph second hand doesn't reset to zero.

chronex_returns.notes: please redund me as soon as possible

chronex_returns.name: Kabir Sharma
chronex_returns.reason: Sizing issue / watch too large for wrist

chronex_returns.name: Ananya Iyer
chronex_returns.reason: Found minor defect on bezel alignment

chronex_returns.name: Vikram Malhotra
chronex_returns.reason: Incorrect color shipped (wanted green, got black)

chronex_returns.name: Meera Reddy
chronex_returns.reason: Changed mind, want to upgrade to Rolex instead

chronex_returns.name: Aditya Sen
chronex_returns.reason: Bracelet too small, need extra links

chronex_returns.name: Nisha Patel
chronex_returns.reason: Gift recipient already owns similar model

chronex_returns.name: Rajesh Gupta
chronex_returns.reason: Crown feels loose and hard to wind

chronex_returns.name: Shreya Joshi
chronex_returns.reason: Dial color looks different in daylight

chronex_returns.name: Karan Verma
chronex_returns.reason: Minor scratch on clasp on arrival

chronex_returns.name: Diya Kapoor
chronex_returns.reason: Rotor makes rattling sound inside case

chronex_products.name: Submariner Date "Starbucks"
chronex_products.description: The Rolex Submariner Date in Oystersteel with a green Cerachrom ceramic bezel and a black dial. An iconic divers' watch that has transcended its tool heritage to become a global symbol of achievement and luxury.

specs.strapMaterial: Oystersteel Bracelet with Oysterlock Safety Clasp
specs.glass: Scratch-resistant Sapphire, Cyclops lens over the date

reviews.author: Vikram S.
reviews.comment: Absolutely stunning. The green bezel pops in the sunlight.

reviews.author: Rahul M.
reviews.comment: A grail watch. Happy to finally have it in my collection.

reviews.author: Aman K.
reviews.comment: Waitlist was long but worth it.

chronex_products.name: Speedmaster Professional Moonwatch
chronex_products.description: The Omega Speedmaster Professional Moonwatch is one of the world's most iconic timepieces. Having played a part in all six lunar missions, the legendary chronograph is an impressive representation of the brand’s adventurous pioneering spirit.

reviews.author: Karan D.
reviews.comment: The history behind this watch is unmatched.

reviews.author: Siddharth J.
reviews.comment: Great watch but the bracelet could be slightly better.

chronex_products.name: Centrix Automatic Open Heart
chronex_products.description: The popular Centrix Automatic Open Heart watch showcases the high-quality Swiss automatic movement inside through a beautifully cut-out dial. Crafted in signature high-tech ceramic and stainless steel for scratch-resistant luxury.

specs.caseMaterial: Stainless Steel & Rose Gold PVD coating
specs.strapMaterial: High-Tech Ceramic and Stainless Steel Links

reviews.author: Priya T.
reviews.comment: Looks incredibly elegant on the wrist. Love the open heart.

chronex_products.name: Carrera Chronograph "Glassbox"
chronex_products.description: Designed for high-speed racing drivers, this TAG Heuer Carrera features a signature 'glassbox' dome sapphire crystal that curves elegantly over the tachymeter scale, wrapping around the edge of the case for maximum legibility.

specs.glass: Domed Sapphire Crystal with double anti-reflective treatment

reviews.author: Arjun P.
reviews.comment: The glassbox design is a game changer for TAG.

chronex_products.name: PRX Powermatic 80 Blue Dial
chronex_products.description: An essential timepiece with an integrated bracelet and a distinctive waffle dial. The Tissot PRX Powermatic 80 is a modern rebirth of a classic 1978 design, powered by a state-of-the-art Swiss automatic movement.

specs.glass: Scratch-resistant Sapphire Crystal with anti-reflective coating

reviews.author: Rohan B.
reviews.comment: Best value for money Swiss watch right now.

reviews.author: Neeraj G.
reviews.comment: Fits perfectly. The integrated bracelet is super comfortable.

chronex_products.name: 5 Sports GMT 'Blueberry'
chronex_products.description: The highly anticipated Seiko 5 Sports GMT series brings dual-time capabilities to an accessible price point. Features a striking blue dial, a two-tone blue and black rotating bezel, and a robust five-row steel bracelet.

specs.movement: Seiko Caliber 4R34 Automatic, Manual Winding Capable

chronex_products.name: Eco-Drive Promaster Diver
chronex_products.description: Powered by light, any light, this Citizen Promaster Diver never needs a battery. Built to ISO standards with a durable blue polyurethane strap, deep blue dial, and easy-to-read luminous hands and markers.

specs.powerReserve: 6 months on full charge in complete darkness

chronex_products.name: Edge Ultra-Thin Ceramic
chronex_products.description: One of the slimmest ceramic watches in the world, the Titan Edge series is a marvel of indigenous watch engineering. Measuring just 4.4 mm in thickness, it delivers sophisticated minimalist elegance.

specs.movement: Titan Ultra-slim Quartz Movement (1.15 mm thick)

chronex_products.name: Expedition North Field Post
chronex_products.description: A rugged solar-powered field watch designed for the outdoors. Features an eco-friendly fabric strap made from recycled plastics, a stainless steel case, and Timex's legendary adventure-ready durability.

specs.powerReserve: Up to 4 months on full charge

chronex_products.name: Townsman Mechanical Chronograph
chronex_products.description: Featuring an eye-catching skeleton dial that showcases the intricate automatic movement, the Townsman is a sophisticated design that adds style to both casual and formal outfits.

specs.caseMaterial: Stainless Steel Case, Rose Gold PVD

chronex_products.name: Reflex Beat Smart Watch
chronex_products.description: An active lifestyle smartwatch from Fastrack, featuring a vibrant touch display, heart rate monitor, sleep tracker, multiple sports modes, and up to 7 days of battery life.

chronex_products.name: G-Shock Master of G Mudmaster
chronex_products.description: The ultimate rugged timepiece. The Mudmaster is built to withstand the harshest environments with a mud-resistant structure, carbon-fiber reinforced core, compass, altimeter, and step counter.

chronex_products.name: Raga Viva Rose Gold Edition
chronex_products.description: Designed for the modern Indian woman, the Titan Raga Viva features an elegant rose-gold dial with jewel-encrusted markers and a beautifully crafted metal jewelry bracelet.

chronex_products.name: Classic DW-5600 Digital
chronex_products.description: The original square G-Shock design that started it all. Highly shock-resistant, water-resistant, featuring a multi-function alarm, stopwatch, and EL backlight for total utility.

chronex_products.name: Constellation Co-Axial 29mm
chronex_products.description: The dramatic and enduring design of the OMEGA Constellation is characterized by its famous half-moons, 'claws' on the case, and mono-rang bracelet. Features a mother-of-pearl dial with diamond hour markers.

specs.strapMaterial: Stainless Steel and 18K Yellow Gold Bracelet
specs.glass: Domed scratch-resistant sapphire crystal with anti-reflective treatment on both sides

chronex_products.name: Vintage Digital Gold Dial
chronex_products.description: A retro classic from Casio. Featuring a stainless steel band, gold-plated case, daily alarm, hourly time signal, and auto-calendar. Perfect for daily casual wear.
